title: Autoscribe Config
description: Committed configuration for an Autoscribe docs site. Lives at `.autoscribe/config.json` in the docs (tenant) repo and travels with the project. Holds NO secrets — the Anthropic API key is a GitHub repo secret (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY), never stored here.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor IntelliSense.

watchedRepo.description: The code repository Autoscribe documents and watches for merged PRs, in `owner/name` form. One watched repo per docs site (1:1 for the MVP).

docsDir.description: Directory in THIS docs repo where Docusaurus markdown/MDX content lives. Autoscribe writes and edits files only under this path (plus `sidebars.ts`).

style.description: House-style hints handed to the editorial pass and the per-PR analyst so generated prose is consistent.

voice.description: Desired writing voice / tone for generated docs.

audience.description: Primary reader the docs are written for. Steers depth and vocabulary.

model.description: Claude model alias used for per-PR sync work (the common, cost-sensitive path). Sonnet is the conservative default.

initModel.description: Claude model alias used only for the one-time initial full-repo build (`autoscribe-init`), where extra capability is worth the cost.

waveSize.description: Maximum number of parallel sub-agents per wave during fan-out (e.g. the initial build's one-section-per-agent pass). Caps concurrency to keep cost and rate-limit pressure predictable. Ported from the reference pipeline's wave-based concurrency guard.

spendCeilingUSD.description: Soft spend ceiling, in USD, for a single Action run. When the runner's estimated/observed spend for a run would exceed this, it stops early and records the breach instead of continuing. Because it is the user's own Anthropic key, this is a guardrail against runaway bills.
